query:
SELECT lu.id, lu.displayName, lu.lineUserId, s.plan, s.status 
FROM line_users lu 
LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.userId = lu.id
WHERE lu.displayName LIKE '%高橋%' 
   OR lu.displayName LIKE '%まき%' 
   OR lu.displayName LIKE '%舞%'
ORDER BY lu.displayName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3J5KDBVUjsrxvHe.root --database cX9NcQmb35cA4KMDW3eQdK --execute SELECT lu.id, lu.displayName, lu.lineUserId, s.plan, s.status 
FROM line_users lu 
LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.userId = lu.id
WHERE lu.displayName LIKE '%高橋%' 
   OR lu.displayName LIKE '%まき%' 
   OR lu.displayName LIKE '%舞%'
ORDER BY lu.displayName;
